hero.title: Learn Vietnamese Naturally
hero.subtitle: With Win, a native Vietnamese speaker based in Seoul. 5-star rated teacher with 362+ positive reviews.

native.title: Native Vietnamese Speaker
native.description: From Central Vietnam, I bring authentic pronunciation and cultural insights to every lesson.

experience.title: Proven Track Record
experience.description: 5/5 rating with 362+ reviews. My students consistently achieve their learning goals.

multilingual.title: Korean & English Fluent
multilingual.description: I can explain Vietnamese grammar and nuances in Korean or English for better understanding.

flexible.title: Online & Offline Lessons
flexible.description: Choose between online lessons via Zoom/Meet or in-person sessions in Seoul.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Hi! I'm Nguyên (Win/윈), a Vietnamese teacher living in Seoul since 2016. I hold a graduate degree in Tourism Science and I'm passionate about helping people discover the beauty of the Vietnamese language. I focus on speaking practice with lots of repetition to help you build real conversational confidence.

cta.title: Ready to Start Learning?
cta.subtitle: Choose from beginner, intermediate, or conversation lessons. Online or in-person in Seoul.
